notes.max_monitor_duration: How long to wait for perfect entry (seconds). Default 600s (10 min).
notes.continuous_monitoring: If true, checks every check_interval_seconds until conditions met.
notes.check_interval: Seconds between each check. Lower = faster entry but more API calls.
notes.trend_timeframes: Use ['1hour'] for stocks without 4H history, or ['4hour', '1hour'] for comprehensive check.
notes.relaxed_thresholds: RSI and volume thresholds are now more relaxed for better fill rates.
